title: Fix Invalid Client Error When Adding Second Salesforce Instance
story: As a DataTools Pro user with multiple Salesforce orgs, I want to add a second Salesforce instance without encountering an invalid client error, so that I can manage multiple orgs.
description:
## Bug
On production, attempting to add a second Salesforce instance resulted in an "Invalid Client" error during the OAuth flow.

## Fix
Resolved the OAuth client configuration issue that prevented adding a second Salesforce instance.
acceptance_criteria: Users can add a second Salesforce instance without errors
OAuth flow completes successfully for additional instances
middleware_changes: Fixed OAuth client configuration for adding additional Salesforce instances.
implementation_notes: The OAuth client ID/secret configuration was not properly scoped for multi-instance support. Fixed to handle the second instance OAuth flow correctly.
